brock_notes: Primarily white, there is some slight Lavendar, green, and blue “scuffing” patterns on several spots of the shorts. The scuffing is very subtle, most of the shorts are white.
Black with blue energy licking at the bottom of the shorts and up one of the legs.
Navy Blue “reverse Pentagon” coming down from waistband and cutting down athlete. Light blue shape shadowing the navy. The rest is white going to legs.

Solid black waistband with same black color leading into the texture of the shorts (about 2-3 inches) to red/coral, then going to a transitional yellow until the leg. Has a “sunset” like feel with the color gradient
Solid Red band. Main body of the design is a color gradient from red to white.One leg has 2 red blocks.Sides have a solid white line going up and across.
Black band into a black “scuff” graffiti into yellow. Black bands around leg
